member.name: T:NeXroll.Jellyfin.NexrollIntroProvider
member.summary: Jellyfin intro provider that fetches the currently-active preroll paths from a NeXroll server and returns them as items for playback injection.

member.name: M:NeXroll.Jellyfin.NexrollIntroProvider.TranslatePath(System.String,NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Translate a NeXroll local path to a Jellyfin-accessible path using the configured prefix replacement.

member.name: T:NeXroll.Jellyfin.Plugin
member.summary: Main plugin class for NeXroll Intros. Registers the plugin with Jellyfin and exposes configuration.

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.Plugin.Name
member.summary: Plugin name shown in the Jellyfin dashboard.

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.Plugin.Description
member.summary: Short description for the plugin catalog.

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Current singleton instance (set by the constructor).

member.name: T:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Holds user-configurable settings for the NeXroll Intros plugin.

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.NexrollUrl
member.summary: Base URL of the NeXroll server, e.g. "http://192.168.1.50:9393".

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.ApiKey
member.summary: Optional API key for authenticating with the NeXroll server (future use).

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.PathPrefixFrom
member.summary: Path prefix as seen by NeXroll (the local/container path). Used to translate paths so Jellyfin can find the files. Example: "/data/prerolls"

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.PathPrefixTo
member.summary: Replacement path prefix that Jellyfin can access. Example: "/mnt/media/prerolls"

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.EnableForMovies
member.summary: Whether to inject intros before movies.

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.EnableForEpisodes
member.summary: Whether to inject intros before episodes.

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.MaxIntros
member.summary: Maximum number of intros to inject per playback session. 0 = unlimited (use all returned by NeXroll).

member.name: P:NeXroll.Jellyfin.PluginConfiguration.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Request timeout in seconds when calling the NeXroll server.
